prestazioni: Engine: Ford-derived **Roush-Yates 6.0L V8 (Roush 6LS)** with forged internals, billet crankshaft, and titanium connecting rods. Upgrade to a **Garrett GT4202R turbocharger** (84mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 46mm external bypass valve** for 1,000+ HP capability on E85. Custom **Motec M150 ECU** with race-grade lambda sensors and individual cylinder fuel trims.

Drivetrain: **Xtrac P1046 6-speed sequential transaxle** with carbon-fiber clutch plates and a **Penske 8760 triple-adjustable differential** (preload, ramp angle, and locking bias). Upgrade to **AP Racing CP8450 6-piston calipers** with 380mm carbon-ceramic rotors and **Ferodo DS3000 pads** for endurance braking.

Suspension/Aero: **Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable dampers** with **Eibach 1,200 lb/in springs** and spherical bearing control arms. Custom **Panoz LMP-spec front splitter** with **Gurney flaps** and a **rear diffuser** featuring **Vortex Generators** (CFD-optimized for 1,200 kg downforce at 200 mph). **AIM MXL2 data logger** with **Kistler 9129AA wheel force transducers** for real-time aero mapping.
estetica: Body: **Full carbon-fiber LMP-1 Roadster S replica bodywork** (hand-laid by **Fiberworks Composites**) with **3M Matte Black 1080 vinyl wrap** and **PPF (Paint Protection Film) on high-impact zones**. Custom **LED headlights** (Osram Night Breaker Laser) with **Hella 500 fog lights** integrated into the front splitter.

Interior: **Sparco Pro 2000 carbon-fiber seats** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and **Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel** (Momo LMP replica). **Motec C127 dash display** with **AEM CD-7 data logger** and **Racepak V300SD** for telemetry. **Custom roll cage** (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with **carbon-fiber door panels** and **fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)**.

Wheels/Tires: **BBS LM-GT1 18x12 front / 18x13 rear wheels** (forged magnesium) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (335/710R18 front, 345/710R18 rear)**. **HRE Performance Center-lock adapters** and **ARP extended wheel studs** for rapid pit stops. **Custom anodized gold wheel centers** with **Panoz LMP-1 Roadster S decals** (vinyl by **Avery Dennison**).
